title: Swap Adjacent in LR String
titleCn: 在 LR 字符串中交换相邻字符

testcases.input: start = "RXXLRXRXL", result = "XRLXXRRLX" Output: true Explanation: We can transform start to result following these steps: RXXLRXRXL -> XRXLRXRXL -> XRLXRXRXL -> XRLXXRRXL -> XRLXXRRLX
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can transform start to result following these steps: RXXLRXRXL -> XRXLRXRXL -> XRLXRXRXL -> XRLXXRRXL -> XRLXXRRLX
